title: SoftScoreboard
body:
# **SoftScoreboard**

**SoftScoreboard is a modern and feature-rich Minecraft scoreboard plugin designed for Paper/Spigot servers. It offers a smooth, customizable, and professional scoreboard experience with strong performance and useful integrations.**

**SoftScoreboard is built for servers that want stylish scoreboards, flexible world-based setups, PlaceholderAPI support, and compatibility with players joining through ViaVersion-related plugins.**

## SoftScoreboard Features

### Multiverse Support
Advanced per-world scoreboard system. Set different scoreboards for different worlds such as lobby, survival, PvP, skyblock, and more.

### Via Plugins Support
Compatible with ViaVersion, ViaBackwards, and related plugins so players joining from different Minecraft versions can view the scoreboard properly.

### Color Code & Animation Support
**Supports:**
- Legacy color codes (&a, &b, &c, etc.)
- HEX colors (#FFFFFF)
- RGB colors
- Gradient text
- Animated titles and text effects

### PlaceholderAPI Support
Use dynamic placeholders such as player name, money, rank, ping, world, online count, and more.

### Smooth Performance
Optimized to run efficiently with low server impact and smooth scoreboard updates.

### Easy Configuration
Simple configuration files that are easy to edit and customize.

### Continuous Updates
SoftScoreboard is actively being developed and new updates will be released soon.
 
## **Dependencies**
- **[Vault](https://modrinth.com/project/rj9SgaYL)**
- **[Placeholder api](https://modrinth.com/project/rj9SgaYL)**
- **[EssentialX](https://modrinth.com/project/hXiIvTyT)**
